coreIssue: This growth conversation is about whether Ahmed is defining senior Head of Product scope through strategic ownership or slipping back into tactical delivery.
openingQuestion: What kind of strategic ownership would you want to handle with more confidence to be operating fully at senior Head of Product level?
listenFor: whether he answers with product strategy, decision ownership, and stakeholder influence or quickly drops into sprint and delivery detail
whether he names a specific stakeholder or forum where trust is thin, or stays abstract about visibility and influence
if they describe work they still personally drive instead of outcomes they create through other product leaders or partners
avoid: do not let the conversation turn into a status review of current delivery work
do not offer a generic development list without pinning it to senior Head of Product scope and decision authority
goodOutcome: You and Ahmed have agreed one senior Head of Product growth target defined as an end-to-end strategic area he will own, including the stakeholder forum and decision authority that make it lead-level.
suggestedAction: Before the 1:1, pick one recent example where Ahmed shifted into tactical delivery detail so you can test with him what senior Head of Product ownership would have looked like instead.
